sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_log (id UInt64, value Float64, notes String);
INSERT INTO test_log VALUES (1, 2.71828, 'Euler's number'), (2, 0.0, 'Zero'), (3, -1.0, 'Negative'), (4, NULL, 'Null value');
SELECT id, log(value) AS log_value FROM test_log WHERE log(value) <> log(0.999);
SELECT id, log(value) AS log_value FROM test_log WHERE log(value) <> log(NULLIF(value, 0));
SELECT id, log(value) AS log_value FROM test_log WHERE NOT log(value) <> log(value) OR (log(value) IS NULL);
SELECT id, log(value) AS log_value FROM test_log WHERE log(value) <> (SELECT log(value) FROM test_log WHERE id = 2);
CREATE TABLE test_log2 (id UInt64, ref_id UInt64, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT tl.id, tl.value, log(tl.value) FROM test_log tl JOIN test_log2 tl2 ON tl.id = tl2.ref_id WHERE log(tl.value) <> (SELECT log(MAX(value)) FROM test_log2);
SELECT id, log(value) AS log_val FROM test_log GROUP BY id HAVING log(value) <> log(-1) OR log(value) IS NULL;
SELECT temp_value, log(IFNULL(temp_value, 1)) <> log(0.12345) FROM temp_table WHERE temp_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT temp_value, log(temp_value) FROM temp_table WHERE temp_value <> 1.0;
DELETE FROM test_log WHERE id = 3 AND log(value) IS NOT NULL;
